auth.label: Content API Token
auth.description: Contentful GraphQL Content API access token sent with the Authorization Bearer header. Create or copy delivery and preview tokens from Space settings > API keys in the Contentful web app: https://app.contentful.com/spaces

extraFields.label: Space ID
extraFields.description: Contentful space ID used in GraphQL endpoint paths. Copy it from the Contentful web app space settings or API keys page: https://app.contentful.com/spaces

extraFields.label: Environment ID
extraFields.description: Contentful environment ID used in GraphQL endpoint paths. Use master for the default environment.

extraFields.label: Region
extraFields.description: Contentful GraphQL API region. Use global for graphql.contentful.com or eu for EU data residency on graphql.eu.contentful.com.

actions.name: execute_query
actions.description: Execute a Contentful GraphQL Content API query against a space and environment.

spaceId.description: Contentful space identifier. Defaults to the space configured on the connection when omitted.

environmentId.description: Contentful environment identifier. Defaults to the environment configured on the connection when omitted.

query.description: The GraphQL query document to execute.

variables.description: GraphQL variables keyed by variable name and encoded as JSON values.

operationName.description: The GraphQL operation name to execute when the document defines multiple operations.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for executing a Contentful GraphQL query.

anyOf.description: The GraphQL data object returned by Contentful, or null when execution failed.

line.description: The one-based source line for the GraphQL error.

column.description: The one-based source column for the GraphQL error.

locations.description: Source locations associated with the GraphQL error.

path.description: GraphQL response path entries associated with the error.

items.description: One GraphQL error returned by Contentful.

extensions.description: GraphQL response extensions returned by Contentful.

requestId.description: The Contentful request identifier response header.

queryCost.description: The Contentful GraphQL query cost response header.

rateLimitSecondLimit.description: The per-second Contentful rate limit response header.

rateLimitReset.description: Seconds until the Contentful rate limit resets.
